case_title: BRUNO CELIS MEZA VS. JOSE J. HERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-18-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JOSE J.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-04-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-16-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MEZA, BRUNO CELIS AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JOSE J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-04-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-16-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-16-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEZA, BRUNO CELIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JOSE J. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $117.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,117.50, THE COURT ORDERS RECISSION OF THE AGREEMENT FOR PURCHASE OF THE ACURA AUTOMOBILE. THE PARTIES SHALL COOPERATE IN THE RETURN OF THE CAR TO DEFENDANT, AND PAYMENT OF THE JUDGMENT TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-16-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR, DUPLICATE ENTRY. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
